platform_overview.name: Hyyzo
platform_overview.description: Hyyzo is a cashback and rewards platform that allows users to earn real money while shopping online from 200+ partner stores.
platform_overview.value_proposition: Users shop normally from partner stores and receive cashback that can later be transferred to their bank account.
platform_overview.business_model: Performance-driven model where brands pay only for actual conversions, sales, or customer acquisitions.

vision_mission.vision: To become India’s most trusted performance-driven loyalty and rewards platform.
vision_mission.mission: Help brands acquire and retain high-intent online shoppers through measurable performance-based cashback and rewards.

founders.name: Ashutosh Goyal
founders.background: IIT Kharagpur alumnus, previously worked at American Express.
founders.focus: Building transparent cashback solutions that benefit both users and brands.

founders.name: Nandita Jain
founders.background: Former banker in the Philippines and senior developer at Wipro.
founders.focus: Marketing, brand expansion, and user engagement.

platform_features.shop_and_earn: Users shop through Hyyzo partner stores and earn cashback once the order is confirmed.
platform_features.profit_link: Users can generate a shareable link for a product and earn rewards when others purchase through it.
platform_features.referral_program: Users can invite friends and earn 10% of their cashback earnings.
platform_features.go_link: Allows quick redirection to partner stores without manually creating links.

how_hyyzo_works: Complete purchase on the store website.
Cashback is tracked in Hyyzo wallet.

earning_methods.description: Users shop normally through partner stores and receive cashback after order confirmation.
Users generate a link for any product and earn commission when others purchase through that link.
Users share referral link and earn 10% of the cashback earned by their referrals.

journey.milestone: Platform launched and generated more than ₹5 lakh cashback for users.
Crossed 1 lakh users and distributed over ₹1 crore cashback.
Launched official mobile app and distributed ₹2.5 crore cashback.
Reached 100K Play Store installs and distributed nearly ₹4 crore cashback.

extension_features.purpose: Allows users to activate cashback while browsing partner websites.
steps: Cashback is tracked once order is confirmed.

profit_link_faq.question: How do I create a profit link?
profit_link_faq.answer: Paste the product URL into Hyyzo and click 'Create Profit Link'.

profit_link_faq.question: Is there any earning limit?
profit_link_faq.answer: No, there is no limit on earnings through profit links.

profit_link_faq.question: Where can I share profit links?
profit_link_faq.answer: You can share them via WhatsApp, Telegram, Instagram, SMS, or other social media.

go_link_faq.question: How do I access a store using Go Link?
go_link_faq.answer: Type the Hyyzo Go URL followed by your store name.

go_link_faq.question: Do I need a username?
go_link_faq.answer: Yes, a unique username is required to use Go Link.

go_link_faq.question: How can I remember my Go URL?
go_link_faq.answer: Bookmark it or save it in your notes.

referral_faq.question: How do I invite friends?
referral_faq.answer: Share your referral link via WhatsApp, Telegram, Facebook, or other platforms.

referral_faq.question: Does my friend need to shop through the referral link?
referral_faq.answer: Yes, purchases must happen through the referral link for rewards.

referral_faq.question: Can I withdraw referral earnings?
referral_faq.answer: Yes, referral earnings can be withdrawn to your bank account.

wallet_status.pending: Cashback is waiting for retailer confirmation.
wallet_status.approved: Cashback confirmed and available for withdrawal.

store_widget.customization: Users can edit and select their favorite stores.

profit_link_widget.purpose: Allows users to quickly convert product URLs into profit links directly from home screen.

cashback_activation_states.description: Activation failed due to internet or technical issue.
Green check mark confirms active tracking.

support_faq.question: How can I change my registered phone number?
support_faq.answer: Email redeem@hyyzo.com from your registered email with old and new number.

support_faq.question: How do I upload my PAN card?
support_faq.answer: Go to Hyyzo website, click 'Redeem Cashback', and upload PAN card in the popup.

support_faq.question: Where can I see my monthly earnings?
support_faq.answer: You can view earnings in the Wallet section of the Hyyzo app.

support_faq.question: When will my cashback be approved?
support_faq.answer: Cashback approval depends on retailer confirmation and return period policies.

learned_responses.question: how to change my number
learned_responses.correct_answer: 👋 To change your registered phone number, email **support@hyyzo.com** from your registered email, including both your old and new numbers. 🚀
